brand.name: OliveHorse Fitness Academy

founder.name: Pravin Nawale
founder.shortBio: Pravin Nawale leads OliveHorse Fitness Academy with a structured, student-focused approach to Karate, fitness and practical self-defence. His training philosophy combines discipline, technical development, confidence building and personal progress.

brand.positioning: Professional Karate, fitness and self-defence training for children, teenagers, adults and women in Santacruz and nearby Mumbai suburbs.

bookingRequirements.trialClass: Book at least 24 hours in advance.
bookingRequirements.privateCoaching: Book at least 48 hours in advance.
bookingRequirements.groupWorkshop: Book at least 7 days in advance.
bookingRequirements.schoolOrCorporateWorkshop: Book at least 15 days in advance.

socialProof.reviewCountLabel: Trusted by students and families across Santacruz and nearby Mumbai suburbs
